sql: SELECT "b"."CONTROL" AS "CONTROL", "j1"."mortgage_count" AS "mortgage_count", "j1"."mortgage_total" AS "mortgage_total" FROM "ahs_household" AS "b" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "CONTROL", COUNT(*) AS "mortgage_count", SUM("MORTAMT") AS "mortgage_total" FROM "ahs_mortgage" AS "c1" GROUP BY "CONTROL") AS "j1" ON "b"."CONTROL" = "j1"."CONTROL" ORDER BY "CONTROL" ASC LIMIT 101
display_sql: SELECT "b"."CONTROL" AS "CONTROL", "j1"."mortgage_count" AS "mortgage_count", "j1"."mortgage_total" AS "mortgage_total" FROM "ahs_household" AS "b" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "CONTROL", COUNT(*) AS "mortgage_count", SUM("MORTAMT") AS "mortgage_total" FROM "ahs_mortgage" AS "c1" GROUP BY "CONTROL") AS "j1" ON "b"."CONTROL" = "j1"."CONTROL" ORDER BY "CONTROL" ASC LIMIT 101
